title: Consistent Toolbar Layout for Dictionary Object Detail Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Dictionary object detail page toolbar layout to match the updated layout used on the object management page, so that search, filters, and export icons are consistently positioned.
description:
The Dictionary object detail page (when drilling into a specific object) uses the old toolbar layout where search and export icons are inconsistently placed. Update to match the new standard layout.

## Changes
- Push search bar to the left
- Push action icons to the right
- Move the Filter icon to be the first icon (before the clipboard icon)
acceptance_criteria: Search bar is on the left side of the toolbar
Action icons (export, filter, etc.) are on the right side
Filter icon is the first icon in the right-side icon group
Layout matches the Dictionary object management page
ux_changes: Dictionary object detail page toolbar updated to match the standard layout: search on left, icons on right, filter icon first.
implementation_notes: Toolbar DOM restructured to move search left and icons right. Filter icon reordered to first position.
comment_summary: Developer implemented quickly and pushed to development. Shared screenshot confirming the updated layout.
